mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO backup_expense_records ( id, backup_id, original_id, user_id, amount, date, category, subcategory, supplier_id, supplier_name, product_name, quantity, unit, price, payment_method, business_type, customer_id, customer_name, repaid_amount, is_paid, note, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.backupId}, #{item.originalId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.amount}, #{item.date}, #{item.category}, #{item.subcategory}, #{item.supplierId}, #{item.supplierName}, #{item.productName}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unit}, #{item.price}, #{item.paymentMethod}, #{item.businessType}, #{item.customerId}, #{item.customerName}, #{item.repaidAmount}, #{item.isPaid}, #{item.note}, #{item.createdAt} )
